topic: destemming before fermentation and green tannin reduction

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Stems are removed from the bunches before alcoholic fermentation.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Removing stems prevents their phenolic compounds from being extracted into the fermenting must.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine is less likely to acquire green, coarse stem tannins, although tannin can still be extracted from skins and seeds.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine is less likely to acquire green, coarse stem tannins, although tannin can still be extracted from skins and seeds.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
